description.other_details: This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 3.0 License. To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/.

term_definitions.items: Additional contextual detail to be applied to all compositions.

Provides extra information about the encounter context, regarding the internal cases used at Pathfinder for encounter types and reasons, along with an appointment and encounter id. Terminology should be loaded from the Think!EHR terminology adapter.
Unique identifier for each appointment process.
Unique identifier for each encounter process.
Type of encounter, should be provided by terminology server.
Reason for encounter, should be provided by terminology server.
Consent details that contain general consents when the patient will undergo a specific procedure.
The patient is informed with the procedure and potential problems, received all the information, explanations and instructions.
Explicit patient consent with a procedure to be performed. This is boolean YES or NO.
Explicit patient consent with an application of anesthesia to be performed during the procedure, if applicable. This is boolean YES or NO.
Explicit patient consent to participate in any any research related studies and usage of data for statistic analysis. This is boolean YES or NO.
Generic text field to describe/define consent ID when an organisation/practitioner don't have document management system to assign proper identificator.
Uncoded field used to record where the paper form has been stored.
SLOT to insert specific details related to the procedure will be executed.
Explicit patient consent to participate in any any research related studies and usage of data for statistic analysis. This is boolean YES or NO.
Explicit patient consent to participate in any any research related studies and usage of data for statistic analysis. This is boolean YES or NO.
Details of personal name of an individual, provider or third party.
Name in free text unstructured format.
Name previously used by this person.
Name given to this person at birth.
Other name used by this person.
Name used by this persion before marriage.
The date interval at which this name was valid.
The prefix or title used by the subject.
Additional term used following a person name.
The name used by the subject for business or professional purposes.
The name by which the subject is officially registered.
The subject’s name as it is to be used for reporting, when used with a specific identifier.
Indicates that this is the name by which a person chooses to be identified.
Professional demographics details including name(s) , addresse(s) and telecommunication contact details.
The employment grade or position of the carer.
Team to which the individual belongs.
The period during which this professional was involved in care of the subject.
Personal name details of the individual.
Professional role details of the individual.
Organisation details to which the individual is attached.
Details about a contact person within organisation.

Record of status and details of informed consent from a patient (or patient's agent) for a proposed procedure, trial or other healthcare-related activity (including treatments and investigations), based upon a clear appreciation and understanding of the facts, implications, and possible future consequences by the patient or patient's agent.
Identification of the procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity (including correct side/correct site, where appropriate) against which the consent status and details are recorded.
Additional structured details about the procedure/trial/activity itself or additional structured consent details.
For example: intent/purpose; anaesthetic details; disclosure of material risks; and proposed benefits discussed.
Form of the consent sought or provided.
Format of the consent is written.
Format of the consent is verbal.
Reason that the care pathway step for the identified procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity was carried out.
For example, the reason for 'consent refused' or 'consent withdrawn'.
Date, and optional time, when validity of the informed consent becomes active.
Date, and optional time, when validity of the informed consent ceased.
Details of any qualifications or exemptions to the informed consent.
Narrative description of the informed consent required or recorded prior to performing the proposed procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity.
For example, audio of consent being requested or image of written consent obtained.
Need for informed consent is identified.
Informed consent has been requested from the patient or patient's agent, but no response has been received.
Informed consent has been provided by the patient or patient's agent.
In response to a request for informed consent, it has been refused by patient or patient's agent.
Following initial provision of informed consent, it has been withrawn by the patient or patient's agent.
Intent to request informed consent has been cancelled, prior to requesting consent from patient or patient's agent..
Intent to request informed consent has been postponed.
Informed consent was not obtainable from either the patient or patient's advocate.
Informed consent has been provided by the patient or patient's agent and the activity is now complete.
Identification of the consent form or document used.
Date when consent status is due for review.
An appointment has been scheduled to request consent.
Details about the healthcare provider who is requesting or recording the consent.
Insert archetyped demographic details in this SLOT if it is not possible to use other_participations.
Details about the subject (or subject's agent) who is being requested for, or providing, the consent for the procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity.
Insert archetyped demographic details in this SLOT if it is not possible to use other_participations.
Narrative description of the procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity.
Description of the intent of the procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity.
Identification of the information made available.
For example, the name of the form.
Details about Patient Information made available to the subject or subject's agent.
Digital representation of the Patient Information made available.
Narrative description of the patient information made available.
Interaction, contact or care event between a subject of care and healthcare provider(s).
Additional information required to capture local context or to align with other reference models/formalisms.
e.g. Local hospital departmental infomation or additional metadata to align with FHIR or CIMI equivalents.

items.items: *Interaction, contact or care event between a subject of care and healthcare provider(s). (en)
*Additional information required to capture local context or to align with other reference models/formalisms. (en)
*e.g. Local hospital departmental infomation or additional metadata to align with FHIR or CIMI equivalents. (en)

*Record of status and details of informed consent from a patient (or patient's agent) for a proposed procedure, trial or other healthcare-related activity (including treatments and investigations), based upon a clear appreciation and understanding of the facts, implications, and possible future consequences by the patient or patient's agent. (en)

*Identification of the procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity (including correct side/correct site, where appropriate) against which the consent status and details are recorded. (en)
*Additional structured details about the procedure/trial/activity itself or additional structured consent details. (en)
*For example: intent/purpose; anaesthetic details; disclosure of material risks; and proposed benefits discussed. (en)
*Form of the consent sought or provided. (en)
*Reason that the care pathway step for the identified procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity was carried out. (en)
*For example, the reason for 'consent refused' or 'consent withdrawn'. (en)
*Date, and optional time, when validity of the informed consent becomes active. (en)
*Date, and optional time, when validity of the informed consent ceased. (en)
*Details of any qualifications or exemptions to the informed consent. (en)
*Narrative description of the informed consent required or recorded prior to performing the proposed procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity. (en)
*For example, audio of consent being requested or image of written consent obtained. (en)
*Informed consent has been requested from the patient or patient's agent, but no response has been received. (en)
*Informed consent has been provided by the patient or patient's agent. (en)
*In response to a request for informed consent, it has been refused by patient or patient's agent. (en)
*Following initial provision of informed consent, it has been withrawn by the patient or patient's agent. (en)
*Intent to request informed consent has been cancelled, prior to requesting consent from patient or patient's agent.. (en)
*Intent to request informed consent has been postponed. (en)
*Informed consent was not obtainable from either the patient or patient's advocate. (en)
*Informed consent has been provided by the patient or patient's agent and the activity is now complete. (en)
*Identification of the consent form or document used. (en)
*Date when consent status is due for review. (en)
*An appointment has been scheduled to request consent. (en)
*Details about the healthcare provider who is requesting or recording the consent. (en)
*Insert archetyped demographic details in this SLOT if it is not possible to use other_participations. (en)
*Details about the subject (or subject's agent) who is being requested for, or providing, the consent for the procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity. (en)
*Insert archetyped demographic details in this SLOT if it is not possible to use other_participations. (en)
*Narrative description of the procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity. (en)
*Description of the intent of the procedure, clinical trial or healthcare-related activity. (en)
*For example, the name of the form. (en)
*Details about Patient Information made available to the subject or subject's agent. (en)
*Digital representation of the Patient Information made available. (en)
*Narrative description of the patient information made available. (en)

*Provides extra information about the encounter context, regarding the internal cases used at Pathfinder for encounter types and reasons, along with an appointment and encounter id. Terminology should be loaded from the Think!EHR terminology adapter. (en)
*Type of encounter, should be provided by terminology server. (en)
*Reason for encounter, should be provided by terminology server. (en)
Podrobnosti soglasja, ki vsebuje splošna pod-soglasja pacienta, kot na primer: soglasje za izvedbo posega, anestezije, uporabe podatkov za študijske in statistične namene ipd.
Pacient je seznanjen s posegom in možnimi zapleti, dobil je vsa potrebna pojasnila in navodila.
Soglasje s posegom. Možnost izbire DA ali NE.
Soglasje z anestezijo. Možnost izbire DA ali NE.
Soglasje z uporabo podatkov za študije, raziskave in statistiko. Možnost izbire DA ali NE.
Splošno tekstovno polje za opis/definicijo identifikatorja dokumenta soglasja, ko organizacija/zdravnik nima na voljo dokumentnega sistema, ki bi določil ustrezen identifikator.
Nešifrirano tekstovno polje za beleženje mesta hrambe soglasja.
PREDAL za vstavljanje dodatnih podatkov vezanih na poseg, ki se bo izvedel.
Za primere, ko poseg ni opisan že v drugem primernem arhetipu.
Soglasje z uporabo podatkov za študije, raziskave in statistiko. Možnost izbire DA ali NE.
Soglasje z uporabo podatkov za študije, raziskave in statistiko. Možnost izbire DA ali NE.
*Details about a contact person within organisation. (en)
*Professional demographics details including name(s) , addresse(s) and telecommunication contact details. (en)
*The employment grade or position of the carer. (en)
*The period during which this professional was involved in care of the subject. (en)
*Organisation details to which the individual is attached. (en)
*Details of personal name of an individual, provider or third party. (en)
*Name given to this person at birth. (en)
*Name used by this persion before marriage. (en)
*The date interval at which this name was valid. (en)
*The prefix or title used by the subject. (en)
*Additional term used following a person name. (en)
*The name used by the subject for business or professional purposes. (en)
*The name by which the subject is officially registered. (en)
*The subject’s name as it is to be used for reporting, when used with a specific identifier. (en)
*Indicates that this is the name by which a person chooses to be identified. (en)
